image:image.image:title: MagniKnot Logo - Elegant Jewellery Brand
image:image.image:caption: MagniKnot — Where Love Finds Its Pull. Modern minimal jewellery brand from India.

image:image.image:title: Eternal Gold Chain - MagniKnot
image:image.image:caption: Timeless gold-plated chain, lightweight and elegant for everyday wear.

image:image.image:title: Tulip Bracelet - MagniKnot
image:image.image:caption: Delicate rose-gold bracelet inspired by spring tulips.

image:image.image:title: Minimal Stack Ring Set - MagniKnot
image:image.image:caption: Set of three delicate sterling silver stacking rings.

image:image.image:title: Aurora Statement Earrings - MagniKnot
image:image.image:caption: Bold sculptural gold-plated brass earrings that catch the light beautifully.

image:image.image:title: Pearl Drop Pendant - MagniKnot
image:image.image:caption: Elegant freshwater pearl pendant on a fine gold chain.

image:image.image:title: Heart Charm Bracelet - MagniKnot
image:image.image:caption: Dainty gold-plated chain bracelet with tiny heart charms.

image:image.image:title: MagniKnot Jewellery Collection Preview
image:image.image:caption: Discover rings, bracelets, necklaces and more at MagniKnot.
